parameters.name: size

param_schema.description: Image resolution: 1K (1024px), 2K (2048px), 4K (4096px), or 'custom' for specific dimensions.

parameters.description: Image resolution: 1K (1024px), 2K (2048px), 4K (4096px), or 'custom' for specific dimensions.

parameters.name: width

param_schema.title: Width
param_schema.description: Custom image width (only used when size='custom'). Range: 1024-4096 pixels.

parameters.description: Custom image width (only used when size='custom'). Range: 1024-4096 pixels.

parameters.name: height

param_schema.title: Height
param_schema.description: Custom image height (only used when size='custom'). Range: 1024-4096 pixels.

parameters.description: Custom image height (only used when size='custom'). Range: 1024-4096 pixels.

parameters.name: max_images

param_schema.title: Max Images
param_schema.description: Maximum number of images to generate when sequential_image_generation='auto'. Range: 1-15. Total images (input + generated) cannot exceed 15.

parameters.description: Maximum number of images to generate when sequential_image_generation='auto'. Range: 1-15. Total images (input + generated) cannot exceed 15.

parameters.name: image_input

param_schema.title: Image Input
param_schema.description: Input image(s) for image-to-image generation. List of 1-10 images for single or multi-reference generation.

parameters.description: Input image(s) for image-to-image generation. List of 1-10 images for single or multi-reference generation.

parameters.name: aspect_ratio

param_schema.description: Image aspect ratio. Only used when size is not 'custom'. Use 'match_input_image' to automatically match the input image's aspect ratio.

parameters.description: Image aspect ratio. Only used when size is not 'custom'. Use 'match_input_image' to automatically match the input image's aspect ratio.

parameters.name: sequential_image_generation

param_schema.description: Group image generation mode. 'disabled' generates a single image. 'auto' lets the model decide whether to generate multiple related images (e.g., story scenes, character variations).

parameters.description: Group image generation mode. 'disabled' generates a single image. 'auto' lets the model decide whether to generate multiple related images (e.g., story scenes, character variations).

size.description: Image resolution: 1K (1024px), 2K (2048px), 4K (4096px), or 'custom' for specific dimensions.

width.title: Width
width.description: Custom image width (only used when size='custom'). Range: 1024-4096 pixels.

height.title: Height
height.description: Custom image height (only used when size='custom'). Range: 1024-4096 pixels.

max_images.title: Max Images
max_images.description: Maximum number of images to generate when sequential_image_generation='auto'. Range: 1-15. Total images (input + generated) cannot exceed 15.

image_input.title: Image Input
image_input.description: Input image(s) for image-to-image generation. List of 1-10 images for single or multi-reference generation.

aspect_ratio.description: Image aspect ratio. Only used when size is not 'custom'. Use 'match_input_image' to automatically match the input image's aspect ratio.

sequential_image_generation.description: Group image generation mode. 'disabled' generates a single image. 'auto' lets the model decide whether to generate multiple related images (e.g., story scenes, character variations).
